name: Pineapple Seven-up Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 medium can Crushed pineapple, do not drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together cake mix and instant pudding.
2. Add oil to the mixture.
3. Add eggs, beating well after each addition.
4. Add Seven-Up. Beat until well combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for approximately 30 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the edge of the pan.
Frosting:
1. Mix together sugar and flour.
2. Gradually add the remaining frosting ingredients (margarine, egg yolks) except coconut and chopped pecans.
3. Cook over low heat on a stovetop or in a microwave until thickened.
4. Add coconut and chopped pecans.
5. Spread frosting evenly over the cooled cake.
